About Kenny

A CRAFTSMAN.
NOT A CALL CENTER.

"When the job is done, it's done right. That's the only standard we work to."

Kenny Estes is a licensed Kentucky Master Plumber who takes genuine pride in every job his team completes. Based in Metcalfe County, serving South Central Kentucky for nearly two decades.

Residential repairs, commercial builds, new construction — handled with the precision and care of someone who has built their reputation one job at a time. Not a franchise. Not a contractor. A craftsman.

24/7 Emergency
Busted Pipe?

Frozen or burst pipes can flood your home in minutes. We answer day and night — don't wait.

Call 270-576-8505

Leak Repair

Fast diagnosis and repair of pipe leaks, fixture failures, and hidden water damage.

Drain Cleaning

Clear stubborn blockages and restore full flow to slow or backed-up drains.

New Construction

Complete rough-in and finish plumbing for new homes, additions, and commercial projects.

Fixture Installs

Sinks, toilets, showers, tubs, and faucets installed precisely — guaranteed.

Well Pumps

Installation and service of well pump systems for rural and agricultural properties.

Sewer Lines

Sewer line inspection, repair, and complete replacement with durable materials.

Emergency Service

Burst pipe? Major leak? We answer day and night, 24 hours, 7 days a week.

Commercial

Full commercial plumbing for businesses, restaurants, and facilities of any size.
